languages.original_text: "For centuries, that vile creature robbed the Aett-Vater's forefather of the joy of serving in the name of Humanity. That warrior deserves to at last find glorious death in the boundless Koronus Expanse!"

languages.text: "Поганая тварь на столетия отняла у прародителя этфаттера радость служения во имя Человечества. Этот воин заслужил того, чтобы наконец отыскать славную погибель в бескрайнем Просторе Коронус!"

"For centuries, that vile creature robbed the Aett-Vater's forefather of the joy of serving in the name of Humanity. That warrior deserves to at last find glorious death in the boundless Koronus Expanse!"
languages.original_text: "Поганая тварь на столетия отняла у прародителя этфаттера радость служения во имя Человечества. Этот воин заслужил того, чтобы наконец отыскать славную погибель в бескрайнем Просторе Коронус!"

traits.locale_text: "The decision to leave Seberian was a brave one. But we will still have to explain to the Adeptus Administratum how there can be two official von Valancius Rogue Traders in the Expanse."
"The decision to leave Seberian was a brave one. But we will still have to explain to the Adeptus Administratum how there can be two official von Valancius Rogue Traders in the Expanse."
"The decision to leave Seberian was a brave one. But we will still have to explain to the Adeptus Administratum how there can be two official von Valancius Rogue Traders in the Expanse."

languages.text: 「その卑劣な生き物は、何世紀にもわたって、アエット・ヴァターの祖先から人類の名の下での奉仕の喜びを奪ってきた。その戦士は、ついに無辺なコロナス・エクスパンスで栄光ある死を迎えるに値する！」
languages.original_text: "For centuries, that vile creature robbed the Aett-Vater's forefather of the joy of serving in the name of Humanity. That warrior deserves to at last find glorious death in the boundless Koronus Expanse!"

traits.locale_text: 「その卑劣な生き物は、何世紀にもわたって、アエット・ヴァターの祖先から人類の名の下での奉仕の喜びを奪ってきた。その戦士は、ついに無辺なコロナス・エクスパンスで栄光ある死を迎えるに値する！」

languages.text: « Pendant des siècles, cette vile créature a privé l'ancêtre de l'aett-vater de la joie de servir au nom de l'humanité. Ce guerrier mérite de connaître enfin une mort glorieuse dans l'immensité des Étendues de Koronus ! »
languages.original_text: "For centuries, that vile creature robbed the Aett-Vater's forefather of the joy of serving in the name of Humanity. That warrior deserves to at last find glorious death in the boundless Koronus Expanse!"

traits.locale_text: « Pendant des siècles, cette vile créature a privé l'ancêtre de l'aett-vater de la joie de servir au nom de l'humanité. Ce guerrier mérite de connaître enfin une mort glorieuse dans l'immensité des Étendues de Koronus ! »

languages.text: "Seit Jahrhunderten beraubt diese elende Kreatur den Vorfahren des Aett-Vaters der Freude, der Menschheit zu dienen. Dieser Krieger verdient es, in der grenzenlosen Koronus-Ausdehnung endlich ruhmreich zu sterben!"
languages.original_text: "For centuries, that vile creature robbed the Aett-Vater's forefather of the joy of serving in the name of Humanity. That warrior deserves to at last find glorious death in the boundless Koronus Expanse!"

traits.locale_text: "Seit Jahrhunderten beraubt diese elende Kreatur den Vorfahren des Aett-Vaters der Freude, der Menschheit zu dienen. Dieser Krieger verdient es, in der grenzenlosen Koronus-Ausdehnung endlich ruhmreich zu sterben!"

languages.text: "O aşağılık yaratık, yüzyıllar boyunca Aett-Vater'nın atasını İnsanlık adına hizmet etme sevincinden mahrum bıraktı. O savaşçı, nihayet uçsuz bucaksız Koronus Enginliği'nde şanlı bir ölüme kavuşmayı hak ediyor!"
languages.original_text: "For centuries, that vile creature robbed the Aett-Vater's forefather of the joy of serving in the name of Humanity. That warrior deserves to at last find glorious death in the boundless Koronus Expanse!"

traits.locale_text: "O aşağılık yaratık, yüzyıllar boyunca Aett-Vater'nın atasını İnsanlık adına hizmet etme sevincinden mahrum bıraktı. O savaşçı, nihayet uçsuz bucaksız Koronus Enginliği'nde şanlı bir ölüme kavuşmayı hak ediyor!"

languages.text: «Durante siglos, esa vil criatura ha privado al antepasado {mf|del|de la} Aett-Vater de la dicha que entraña el servicio en nombre de la Humanidad. ¡Ese guerrero se merece hallar una gloriosa muerte en la interminable Extensión de Koronus!».
languages.original_text: "For centuries, that vile creature robbed the Aett-Vater's forefather of the joy of serving in the name of Humanity. That warrior deserves to at last find glorious death in the boundless Koronus Expanse!"

traits.locale_text: «Durante siglos, esa vil criatura ha privado al antepasado {mf|del|de la} Aett-Vater de la dicha que entraña el servicio en nombre de la Humanidad. ¡Ese guerrero se merece hallar una gloriosa muerte en la interminable Extensión de Koronus!».

languages.text: “数百年来，那邪异的生物剥夺了狼领先祖为人类而战的荣耀。如今，那位战士理应在浩瀚无垠的科罗努斯扩区，迎来属于他的光荣战死！”
languages.original_text: "For centuries, that vile creature robbed the Aett-Vater's forefather of the joy of serving in the name of Humanity. That warrior deserves to at last find glorious death in the boundless Koronus Expanse!"
